title: Dreamon Mini Basketball Hoop for Kids | Wall Mounted Basketball Hoop Includes Basketball and Net | Indoor Outdoor Sport Games for Boys Girls
features: [Basketball Hoop Set] This kit including basketball backboard, hoop (ring and net), basketball, pump, other mounting accessories and instruction. With them you can easily complete the installation.

[Wall Mounted & For Door] If you want to use this basketball hoop on the wall, you don't need to install the hooks but drill holes in the wall and screw them in; or install them follow the instruction for door using.
[Indoor & Outdoor Games] This mini basketball hoop is suitable for indoor or outdoor using such as bedroom, office, pool, garden and wherever you like.
[Pretection] With elastic sponge, this kids basketball hoop won't harm the door or wall. When hang it on door, you also can close the door easily everyday.
[Ideal Gifts] Perfect gift for kids or adults on birthday, Halloween, Christmas, etc. Develop basketball interest, discovering hidden athletic talent in the house and encourage healthy life.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 MOUNTING ON DOORS 2 FOR BEDROOM USING 3 SWIMMING POOL TOYS 4 GARDEN PLAYING INFLATING THE BASKETBALLS Package includes 2 high quality basketballs for playing with families or friends. HANGING BASKETABLL NET The basket is bend of 45°, experiencing the fun of slamming to dunk indoor. COMBINE METAL BASKET AND BACK PANEL Please tighten the screws as shown, which will prevent the door or wall from being scratched. INSTALL THE HOOKS Install the hooks and complete the installation.
